title: Peruvian Lomo Saltado
description: A traditional Peruvian stir-fry dish made with tender beef strips, onions, tomatoes, and French fries, served with rice.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the wok and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil to the wok and cook the onion until softened, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the tomato and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the French fries, soy sauce, Aji amarillo pepper, and garlic to the wok. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Return the beef to the wok and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the beef and vegetable mixture over cooked rice.
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
